title: How do I view a log of student quiz participation in Canvas?
plain_text: You can view Canvas quiz logs to view the status of your students' quizzes. This feature is designed to help you investigate problems that a student may have in the quiz and gain insight into your quiz questions. Quiz logs are not intended to validate academic integrity or identify cheating for a quiz. If you have concerns about academic integrity or cheating, please contact your department chair or the Office of Student Conduct and Conflict Resolution. The quiz starts the log when students begin, so some logs may show that the quiz is in progress. If you give the student multiple attempts for a quiz, the log will always show the most recent attempt by default. However, you can view any attempt within the log. Table of Contents: View quiz log results, Example session, Resources. View quiz log results: Navigate to your course in Canvas and select Quizzes from the course navigation menu. Select the name of the quiz. Select three vertical dots (more options icon) and choose 'Show Student Quiz Results'. Locate the name of the student. Select the 'View Log' link. Example session: The session started: This action displays that the student began this attempt and records the timestamp for each quiz action. Stopped viewing / Resumed: This action displays when a student navigates away from the quiz (closes the browser tab, opens a new browser tab, or navigates to a different program). Answered question: This displays when a student has responded to the question. If questions are shown as being answered multiple times, the student either changed their answer(s) or the answer was generated by the quiz's autosave feature. Resources: How do I create and grade a quiz in Canvas?, How do I promote academic integrity using Canvas Classic Quiz?, What are the test, exam, and/or quiz options in Canvas?

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.text: You can view Canvas quiz logs to view the status of your students' quizzes. This feature is designed to help you investigate problems that a student may have in the quiz and gain insight into your quiz questions. Quiz logs are not intended to validate academic integrity or identify cheating for a quiz.

sections.heading: View quiz log results
sections.text: Navigate to your course in Canvas and select Quizzes from the course navigation menu. Select the name of the quiz. Select three vertical dots and choose 'Show Student Quiz Results'. Locate the name of the student. Select the 'View Log' link.

sections.heading: Example session
sections.text: The session started: This action displays that the student began this attempt and records the timestamp for each quiz action. Stopped viewing / Resumed: This action displays when a student navigates away from the quiz. Answered question: This displays when a student has responded to the question.
